MOTION For Order Returning Deposit In Lieu Of Bond
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF RANDALL HUYSER'S MOTION For Order Returning Deposit In Lieu Of Bond is granted. No substantive opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PLAINTIFF RANDALL HUYSER'S MOTION For Order Returning Deposit In Lieu Of Bond is continued to September 28, 2006 on the Court's own motion for parties' failure to supply courtesy copies to the court.
